briefdescription.para: System Tick Handler. Called automatically by the Event Bus.
Request Handler. Processes application requests for health/component status.
Battery Fault Handler. Called when battery service publishes fault events.
MPPT Fault Handler. Called when MPPT service publishes fault events.
Rail Controller Fault Handler. Called when rail controller publishes fault events.
UART Fault Handler. Called when UART HAL detects communication errors.

memberdef.argsstring: (redundancy_manager_t *manager, fault_source_t source, fault_code_t code, fault_severity_t severity)
memberdef.name: redundancy_manager_add_fault

briefdescription.para: Add a fault to the active fault list.
Remove a fault from the active fault list.

simplesect.para: True if fault was found and removed.

briefdescription.para: Evaluate overall system health based on active faults.
